properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The road before my eyes goes over the horizon It seems so far for a man to go, I fall along the way but I'll just keep on trying 'Cause deep within my heart I know.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When the cold and lonely Winter winds are blowing You've got to walk on, walk on If we press on to the end we will be knowing For every dark night there's a dawn If we will walk on, walk on.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If you're out there walking With your head hung down Lift up your eyes -look around, There's joy in the journey even When our hope seems lost, carry on.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The load is heavy and the road is long, It's so hard to be strong, But what you're longing for might be Around the bend, don't give in,

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There is a voice that speaks inside me, That says there's someone Walking right beside me, He's always there to help and guide me, Showing me how to walk on.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh, we've got to walk on, walk on There's joy in the journey Even when all hope seems gone Carry on
